promptDescription: - **wordstream** — animated word-stream visualization showing how word frequencies evolve across time periods, organized by topic/category. Each category occupies a flowing band where word font sizes reflect frequency; hover highlights matching words across all streams; click a word to extract its individual stream with an animated transition, click the stream background to restore. Best for exploring vocabulary evolution, keyword trends across topics, or how language in a text corpus shifts over time. Use lazy SQL: write a query that returns columns period, category, word, frequency, then embed it as "sql":"SELECT..." — the browser fetches and pivots the rows automatically. Column aliases must be: period (time bucket as text), category (topic/group), word (the term), frequency (COUNT or weight). CRITICAL SQL rules: (1) regexp_split_to_table and unnest are set-returning functions — they MUST appear only in the SELECT list or a LATERAL join, NEVER in WHERE. (2) window functions like row_number() CANNOT appear in WHERE — wrap them in a CTE and filter in the next step. Always use this 3-CTE pattern: WITH words AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts)::text AS period, role AS category, regexp_split_to_table(lower(content), '\W+') AS word FROM tbl WHERE content IS NOT NULL AND content <> ''), counted AS (SELECT period, category, word, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM words WHERE char_length(word) >= 3 AND word NOT SIMILAR TO '%[^a-z]%' AND word NOT IN ('the','and','that','this','with','from','have','will','are','for','not','but','can','its','was','has') GROUP BY period, category, word), ranked AS (SELECT *, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY period, category ORDER BY frequency DESC) AS rn FROM counted) SELECT period, category, word, frequency FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 40 ORDER BY period, category, frequency DESC. Spec: { "type":"wordstream", "title":"...", "sql":"<query above>", "topWord":40, "minFont":10, "maxFont":25 }. Notes: SQL must produce at least 2 distinct period values. Omit sql and pass data[] directly as [{"date":"Label", "words":{"Category":[{"text":"word","frequency":15}]}}] when data is already in memory.
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){if(!wrap.offsetHeight)wrap.style.height='520px';function loadD3v4(cb){if(window.d3&&d3.keys){cb();return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src='https://d3js.org/d3.v4.min.js';s.onload=cb;document.head.appendChild(s);}function loadWS(cb){if(typeof window.wordstream==='function'){cb();return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/huyen-nguyen/maker@main/lib/wordstream.min.js';s.onload=cb;document.head.appendChild(s);}loadD3v4(function(){loadWS(function(){var data=spec.data||[];if(!data.length){wrap.style.padding='12px';wrap.style.color='#888';wrap.textContent='Wordstream: spec.data must be a non-empty array.';return;}var allTopics=[];data.forEach(function(p){Object.keys(p.words||{}).forEach(function(t){if(allTopics.indexOf(t)<0)allTopics.push(t);});});data.forEach(function(period,ti){allTopics.forEach(function(topic){if(!period.words[topic])period.words[topic]=[];period.words[topic].forEach(function(w,wi){if(!w.id)w.id='t'+ti+'_'+topic.replace(/\W+/g,'_')+'_'+wi;if(!w.topic)w.topic=topic;});});});var state={topWord:spec.topWord||40,minFont:spec.minFont||10,maxFont:spec.maxFont||25,angle:false,height:0,width:0};var lastDataClone=null;wrap.innerHTML='';wrap.style.display='flex';wrap.style.flexDirection='row';wrap.style.overflow='hidden';var panel=document.createElement('div');panel.style.cssText='width:175px;flex-shrink:0;background:#f5f5f5;border-right:1px solid #ccc;padding:10px 8px;box-sizing:border-box;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;overflow-y:auto;';var ph=document.createElement('div');ph.style.cssText='font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:#222;margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;';ph.textContent='Control Panel';panel.appendChild(ph);function addSlider(icon,label,min,max,val,step,autoZero,setter){var row=document.createElement('div');row.style.cssText='margin-bottom:7px;';var top=document.createElement('div');top.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:2px;color:#555;';if(icon){var ic=document.createElement('span');ic.style.cssText='min-width:18px;font-size:13px;';ic.textContent=icon;top.appendChild(ic);}var nm=document.createElement('span');nm.style.cssText='flex:1;';nm.textContent=label;var vl=document.createElement('span');vl.style.cssText='font-weight:600;color:#333;min-width:32px;text-align:right;';vl.textContent=(autoZero&&val===0)?'Auto':val;top.appendChild(nm);top.appendChild(vl);var sl=document.createElement('input');sl.type='range';sl.min=min;sl.max=max;sl.value=val;sl.step=step||1;sl.style.width='100%';sl.addEventListener('input',function(){var v=+sl.value;vl.textContent=(autoZero&&v===0)?'Auto':v;setter(v);});row.appendChild(top);row.appendChild(sl);panel.appendChild(row);}function addToggle(label,checked,setter){var row=document.createElement('div');row.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;color:#555;';var lbl=document.createElement('span');lbl.textContent=label;var chk=document.createElement('input');chk.type='checkbox';chk.checked=checked;chk.addEventListener('change',function(){setter(chk.checked);});row.appendChild(lbl);row.appendChild(chk);panel.appendChild(row);}addSlider('↕','Height',0,2000,0,50,true,function(v){state.height=v;});addSlider('↔','Width',0,2000,0,50,true,function(v){state.width=v;});addSlider('Aa','Font min',4,30,state.minFont,1,false,function(v){state.minFont=v;});addSlider('AA','Font max',12,80,state.maxFont,1,false,function(v){state.maxFont=v;});addSlider('≡','Top Rank',5,50,state.topWord,5,false,function(v){state.topWord=v;});var sep=document.createElement('div');sep.style.cssText='height:1px;background:#ccc;margin:8px 0 6px;';panel.appendChild(sep);addToggle('Angle Variance',state.angle,function(v){state.angle=v;});var submitBtn=document.createElement('button');submitBtn.textContent='Submit';submitBtn.style.cssText='width:100%;padding:5px 0;margin-top:6px;background:#555;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;';submitBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){renderChart();});panel.appendChild(submitBtn);var sep2=document.createElement('div');sep2.style.cssText='height:1px;background:#ccc;margin:10px 0 6px;';panel.appendChild(sep2);var mh=document.createElement('div');mh.style.cssText='font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:#222;margin-bottom:6px;';mh.textContent='Metrics';panel.appendChild(mh);var metricRows={};['Words displayed','Weighted display rate','Avg norm frequency'].forEach(function(label){var row=document.createElement('div');row.style.cssText='display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;color:#555;font-size:10px;';var lbl=document.createElement('span');lbl.textContent=label;var val=document.createElement('span');val.style.cssText='font-weight:600;color:#333;';val.textContent='—';row.appendChild(lbl);row.appendChild(val);panel.appendChild(row);metricRows[label]=val;});var updBtn=document.createElement('button');updBtn.textContent='Update measurements';updBtn.style.cssText='width:100%;padding:4px 0;margin-top:6px;background:#888;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;';updBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){if(!lastDataClone)return;var allW=[];var maxFreq=0;lastDataClone.forEach(function(p){Object.keys(p.words).forEach(function(cat){p.words[cat].forEach(function(w){allW.push(w);if((w.frequency||0)>maxFreq)maxFreq=w.frequency;});});});var placed=allW.filter(function(w){return w.placed;});var pc=placed.length,tc=allW.length;var sd=0,st=0;allW.forEach(function(w){st+=w.frequency||0;if(w.placed)sd+=w.frequency||0;});var wr=st>0?(sd/st).toFixed(2):'0.00';var sn=0;placed.forEach(function(w){sn+=(w.frequency||0)/(maxFreq||1);});var anf=pc>0?(sn/pc).toFixed(2):'0.00';metricRows['Words displayed'].textContent=pc+'/'+tc;metricRows['Weighted display rate'].textContent=wr;metricRows['Avg norm frequency'].textContent=anf;});panel.appendChild(updBtn);wrap.appendChild(panel);var chartArea=document.createElement('div');chartArea.style.cssText='flex:1;overflow:auto;min-width:0;';wrap.appendChild(chartArea);if(spec.title){var ttl=document.createElement('div');ttl.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;padding:6px 0 2px;color:#333;';ttl.textContent=spec.title;chartArea.appendChild(ttl);}var svgContainer=document.createElement('div');svgContainer.style.cssText='overflow:visible;';chartArea.appendChild(svgContainer);function fixQueryScope(svgEl){svgEl.querySelectorAll('path.curve').forEach(function(bgPath){var topic=bgPath.getAttribute('topic');if(!topic)return;var np=bgPath.cloneNode(false);np.__data__=bgPath.__data__;bgPath.parentNode.replaceChild(np,bgPath);np.addEventListener('click',function(){svgEl.querySelectorAll('.textData').forEach(function(el){var d=el.__data__;if(d&&!d.cloned&&d.placed&&d.topic===topic)el.setAttribute('visibility','visible');});svgEl.querySelectorAll('g[cloned]').forEach(function(el){if(el.getAttribute('topic')===topic&&el.parentNode)el.parentNode.removeChild(el);});svgEl.querySelectorAll('path[wordstream]').forEach(function(el){if(el.getAttribute('topic')===topic&&el.parentNode)el.parentNode.removeChild(el);});});});svgEl.querySelectorAll('.textData').forEach(function(el){el.addEventListener('click',function(){var _orig=d3.select;d3.select=function(sel){if(typeof sel==='string'&&sel.indexOf('path[topic=')===0)return _orig(svgEl).select(sel);return _orig.apply(this,arguments);};setTimeout(function(){d3.select=_orig;},0);},true);});}function fixAxisLabels(svgEl){svgEl.style.overflow='visible';var ticks=Array.prototype.slice.call(svgEl.querySelectorAll('#axisGroup .tick'));if(!ticks.length)return;var items=[];ticks.forEach(function(tick){var text=tick.querySelector('text');if(!text)return;var m=(tick.getAttribute('transform')||'').match(/translate[(]([^,)]+)/);items.push({x:m?parseFloat(m[1]):0,text:text});});items.sort(function(a,b){return a.x-b.x;});items.forEach(function(d){d.text.removeAttribute('transform');d.text.style.fontSize='11px';d.text.style.display='';d.text.setAttribute('text-anchor','middle');var w=0;try{w=d.text.getComputedTextLength();}catch(e){}d._w=w>0?w:d.text.textContent.length*7;});var gap=8;var lastRight=-Infinity;var vis=[];var isFirst=true;items.forEach(function(d){var left=isFirst?d.x:(d.x-d._w/2);var right=isFirst?(d.x+d._w):(d.x+d._w/2);if(left<lastRight+gap){d.text.style.display='none';}else{d.text.setAttribute('text-anchor',isFirst?'start':'middle');lastRight=right;vis.push(d);isFirst=false;}});if(vis.length>1){var last=vis[vis.length-1];var prev=vis[vis.length-2];if(last.x-last._w>=prev.x+prev._w/2+gap)last.text.setAttribute('text-anchor','end');}}function renderChart(){svgContainer.innerHTML='';var W=state.width>0?state.width:(chartArea.offsetWidth||640);var H=state.height>0?state.height:(chartArea.offsetHeight-(spec.title?30:0));if(W<=0)W=640;if(H<200)H=490;if(state.height>0)svgContainer.style.height=H+'px';var dataClone=data.map(function(p){var w={};Object.keys(p.words).forEach(function(cat){w[cat]=p.words[cat].slice();});return{date:p.date,words:w};});var _captured=null;try{Object.defineProperty(d3,'wordstreamLayout',{configurable:true,set:function(fn){_captured=fn;},get:function(){if(state.angle&&_captured){return function(){var layout=_captured.apply(this,arguments);layout.flag('a');return layout;};}return _captured;}});}catch(e){}var svgEl=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','svg');svgContainer.appendChild(svgEl);var svg=d3.select(svgEl).attr('width',W).attr('height',H);window.wordstream(svg,dataClone,{topWord:state.topWord,minFont:state.minFont,maxFont:state.maxFont,tickFont:12,legendFont:spec.legendFont||12,curve:d3.curveMonotoneX});var saved=_captured;try{delete d3.wordstreamLayout;if(saved)d3.wordstreamLayout=saved;}catch(e){}lastDataClone=dataClone;fixQueryScope(svgEl);fixAxisLabels(svgEl);}renderChart();});});}
